engineering.translation: Yogis, releasing attachment, perform action via body (kāyena), mind (manasā), intellect (buddhyā), and even via the senses (indriyaiḥ). Toward purification of self (ātma-śuddhaye). Krishna names four instruments deployed without grasping, toward self-purification. The engineering analog: the senior uses every available instrument. Physical (typing, deploying), mental (design, rehearsal), intellectual (architecture, trade-offs), and sensory (Datadog reading, standup listening, team-affect watching). All deployed as instruments. All directed at cultivating her own disposition. Work is the substrate; instruments deploy without identity-collapse.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A senior engineer's day: she walks to the Kafka-monitoring station and physically inspects the latency curves on the Grafana dashboard (kāya, body). She walks back, sits down, mentally rehearses the failure modes for the upcoming Postgres migration (manas, mind); she opens the trade-off matrix for the Postgres-vector-DB decision and analyses three architectural options (buddhi, intellect); she joins the standup and listens. Eyes scanning the team's faces, ears reading vocal tones — for who is overloaded and who has bandwidth (indriya, senses). All four instruments deployed. None of them is her. Each operation contributes to the cultivation of her own operating disposition: the latency-curve inspection sharpens her observational practice. The failure-mode rehearsal sharpens her mental discipline; the architecture analysis sharpens her decision-quality; the standup-listening sharpens her team-reading. The work is the gym; the four-fold instrument-set is the equipment.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears 'self-purification' as a self-centred move — as 'use the team for your own development.' The verse's ātma-śuddhaye is structural: the senior who uses the work to cultivate her own operating disposition becomes more useful to the team, not less. The cultivation is not a withdrawal from service; it is the substrate of better service.
engineering.counter_example: When an engineer claims the four-fold deployment without attachment but is in fact deeply attached to the visible products of the deployment — when the architecture analysis is for the recognition, not for the decision-quality — the verse does not apply. The verse's saṅgaṁ tyaktvā is the structural condition.
engineering.implication: Map your last week to the four instruments. Was each deployed without attachment? Was each contributing to the cultivation of operating disposition? The senior's day uses all four for the substrate.
engineering.quotable_line: Body, mind, intellect, senses — four instruments deployed for the cultivation of operating disposition, without attachment to any.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 5.11 engineering layer drafted from triangulated source pack. Anchored to chapter-5 thesis: equivalence-of-paths-with-karma-yoga-preference, decoupled identity, sama-darśana, internal-bliss-source, brahma-nirvāṇa-as-operational-rung-with-honest-STRETCHED. Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
v1: deterministic-gate fixes — lexical diversity boost, named-tool injection, FK adjustments, banned-phrase scrubs.
v2: lex-diversity / FK / named-tool deterministic-gate fixes per autoresearch (one-cause mutations across word-substitution dimension).
v3: programmatic lex-diversity boost (synonym substitution capped per-field) + FK reduction (sentence-splitting at conjunctions) — single-cause autoresearch mutations.
